description: DESIGNED FOR CONFIDENT PERFORMERSSleek, durable and well cushioned, the adidas Duramo leather shoe is widely loved for its comfort factor starting from step-in to kick off. A lightweight running shoe, has a meshed upper and lining to ensure ample ventilation and breathability for the feet. With the lightweight mesh used even at the backfoot, you can be rest assured of absolutely fresh feet even after hours of running. Styled with its trademark three stripes from the lacing system to the midsole, these synthetic leather overlays also enhance midfoot support and structure the shoe. The midsole of the adidas Duramo Leather shoe is made of EVA engineered with LightStrike technology that provides more bodily comfort and snug Fit support for the foot. This ergonomic fit for the shoe is sure to bring out that confident performer in you, thus categorizing the Adidas Duramo as a high performance running shoe.Powerhouse of comfortDelivering that fit and comfort that you're always looking for in your running shoe, the Adidas Duramo is designed in a manner to exert maximum power. Engineered with superior cushioning in the heel and lightweight cushioning in the midsole, it offers ample comfort at the right places ensuring a snug fit and keeping the foot in place. With the AdiPRENE cushioning technology employed in the heel to absorb shock and impact, and provide superior cushioning and protection, the outsole of the Adidas Duramo is created using adiWEAR technology to provide the ultimate in durability and traction, making it one of the most stable and long lasting running shoe you can ever own.   Upper Mesh upper for comfort and breathability Mesh lining for breathability Padded sockliner for superior shock absorption and snug fit Rubber toe box embedded onto the toe counter for added durability and better protection to the feet Padded tongue for extra comfort Lace-up front for snug fit Midsole Injected EVA midsole for long-term lightweight cushioning EVA insole for added comfort and shock absorption Arched footbed for ergonomic fit Outsole Multi-directional rubber patterns for better grip on any terrain Scoop below the heel counter for superior cushioning Wash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
